title: Tempting Tropical Algerian Strawberry Tagine
description: A spicy and energizing Algerian dish featuring strawberries and coconut cream, high in protein and perfect for a unique dessert experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, combine the sliced strawberries, coconut cream, almond milk, honey, ground cinnamon, and ground ginger.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the crushed almonds, protein powder, unsalted butter, salt, and cracked black pepper.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Use a hand mixer to aerate the mixture until it is light and fluffy.
Serve the tagine warm, garnished with additional sliced strawberries and crushed almonds if desired.
